The bodies of multiple galotians have been smushed together into a single, Feruze-encapsulating sphere. Every now and then you see the mercenary’s snout emerge to gasp for air. She needs your help to escape!
The gooey creature flows out of the way, like water.

The curvaceous, tantalizing figure of Corellah Dova (or at least, the galotian wearing her face), has been remade into something monstrous. Glowing crimson crystals protrude from smooth, creamy flesh, undulating strangely with her movements. Her black-painted lips curl back in a cruel sneer. No longer does she entertain the thought of a peaceful solution. Corellah seems to determined to realize her dream, no matter how monstrous she must make herself to accomplish it!
Corellah flows aside like a stream of sentient water.

original: The captain’s mech’s similar to the heavy power loader Captain Khorgan used back on Tarkus, vaguely shaped like a Terran ape and wielding clamping arms strong enough to rip a tank apart. It thunders forward unrelentingly, clamping its claws with malicious intent.
The thraggen’s finally had the wind knocked out of her, reeling against a nearby box and struggling to contain her enormous war-boner.

The thraggen Rusher is a statuesque amazon, the pinnacle of her species’ tendency towards towering muscle-babes with heaving big tits and thighs fit to crush skulls. Mhorgenn’s strapped up in a black leather jacket that’s entirely too tight around her rock-hard biceps, and her tight leather pants leave nothing about her growing battle-bulge to the imagination. A messy ash-colored ponytail is pulled back behind a VR visor she was using to manually work her heavy mech, and her betusked face is decorated with warpaint and black lipstick. She’s drawn a crackling energy sword, and though it’s a thin, elegant blade, she’s swinging it around in a two-fisted berserkergang.
The loader mech’s gone face-down on the factory floor, showering sparks everywhere.
The captain’s mech’s similar to the heavy power loader Captain Khorgan used back on Tarkus, vaguely shaped like a Terran ape and wielding clamping arms strong enough to rip a tank apart.
It thunders forward unrelentingly, clamping its claws with malicious intent.
The thing’s gone berserk without Mhorgenn to control it, hurling itself at you with ferocious abandon!

Designed by Paragon to enable actions on both the cold and hot side of the planet, the L.U.C.K. is a surprisingly compact suit of power armor for how well-insulated it is. Compact, hyper-strong servos allow the wielder to operate almost any kind of heavy weapon with ease while remaining in climate controlled comfort all the way up to the boiling point of water.
Your Chameleon Armor is presently transparent, showing off every inch of your body to anyone who wants a look.
